requirement_topic.en: OCPP Interoperability and Network Management for Rwanda Charging Infrastructure
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP互操作与卢旺达充电基础设施网络管理
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP互操作與盧旺達充電基礎設施網絡管理

summary.en: Rwanda's EV charging network governance, under RURA's licensing framework and REG / EUCL's grid oversight, follows IEC-aligned technical standards including OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) for networked charger back-office communication where charging management systems are deployed. OCPP compliance enables remote monitoring, fault reporting, load management, access control, and billing integration for public and semi-public charging points. As Rwanda's IEC 62196 four-wheel charging network is at an early deployment stage as of 2026, the scale and mandatory applicability of OCPP requirements to all operators has not been confirmed from official Rwandan sources; however, project specifications from private network operators, development-finance-backed projects, or government-aligned charging programmes are likely to require OCPP-capable chargers. EMC performance against IEC 61000 series standards is required by RSB PVoC for electrical equipment imports and must be evidenced by accredited test reports.
summary.zh: 卢旺达电动汽车充电网络治理遵循RURA许可框架和REG / EUCL电网监管，在部署充电管理系统的场合，联网充电桩后台通信采用包括OCPP（开放充电点协议）在内的IEC体系技术标准。OCPP合规性使公共和半公共充电点的远程监控、故障报告、负载管理、访问控制和计费集成成为可能。截至2026年，卢旺达IEC 62196四轮充电网络处于早期部署阶段，OCPP要求对所有运营商的强制适用范围尚未从官方来源得到确认；但私营网络运营商、发展融资支持项目或政府主导充电计划的项目规范可能会要求支持OCPP的充电桩。IEC 61000系列EMC性能是RSB PVoC对电气设备进口的要求，须通过认可实验室测试报告加以证明。
summary.zht: 盧旺達電動汽車充電網絡治理遵循RURA許可框架和REG / EUCL電網監管，在部署充電管理系統的場合，聯網充電樁後台通訊採用包括OCPP（開放充電點協議）在內的IEC體系技術標準。OCPP合規性使公共和半公共充電點的遠程監控、故障報告、負載管理、訪問控制和計費集成成為可能。截至2026年，盧旺達IEC 62196四輪充電網絡處於早期部署階段，OCPP要求對所有運營商的強制適用範圍尚未從官方來源得到確認；但私營網絡運營商、發展融資支持項目或政府主導充電計劃的項目規範可能會要求支持OCPP的充電樁。IEC 61000系列EMC性能是RSB PVoC對電氣設備進口的要求，須通過認可實驗室測試報告加以證明。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — back-office communication for networked chargers
IEC 63584 — Standard for OCPP adoption in EV charging (international context)
RSB PVoC — EMC evidence requirement for electrical equipment imports to Rwanda
RURA licensing framework — network operation requirements for EV charging service providers

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use the GB/T 27930-2023 communication protocol between the off-board charger and the battery management system, which is a CAN bus protocol and is not interoperable with OCPP back-office systems or the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack. China AC chargers may implement proprietary or OCPP-based back-office protocols depending on the operator. For EMC, China domestic chargers are certified under GB 9254 / GB 17625 (EMC), which are harmonised with CISPR / IEC 61000 in structure but may differ in test limits and frequency ranges. GB EMC reports may support engineering review but are not accepted as IEC 61000 evidence under RSB PVoC without clause-level comparison.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023通信协议（非车载充电机与电池管理系统之间的CAN总线协议），该协议与OCPP后台系统或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈不兼容。中国交流充电桩根据运营商情况可能采用私有或基于OCPP的后台协议。在EMC方面，中国国内充电桩依据GB 9254 / GB 17625（EMC）认证，其结构上与CISPR / IEC 61000一致，但测试限值和频率范围可能存在差异。GB EMC报告可支持工程审查，但在未完成逐条对比的情况下，不被RSB PVoC视为IEC 61000证据。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023通訊協議（非車載充電機與電池管理系統之間的CAN總線協議），該協議與OCPP後台系統或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧不兼容。中國交流充電樁根據運營商情況可能採用私有或基於OCPP的後台協議。在EMC方面，中國國內充電樁依據GB 9254 / GB 17625（EMC）認證，其結構上與CISPR / IEC 61000一致，但測試限值和頻率範圍可能存在差異。GB EMC報告可支持工程審查，但在未完成逐條對比的情況下，不被RSB PVoC視為IEC 61000證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
GB 9254-2021 — Limits and methods of measurement for radio disturbance characteristics of information technology equipment
GB 17625.1-2022 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) the charger firmware supports OCPP at a version acceptable to the intended Rwanda network operator or project specification; (2) GB/T 27930 DC communication is replaced with the IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 stack for CCS2 DC stations; (3) IEC 61000-series EMC test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory are prepared for RSB PVoC; (4) remote monitoring and fault-reporting functions meet any RURA or project-owner requirements; (5) for smart-metering or radio-frequency functions, confirm RSB / Rwanda Utilities Regulatory Authority radio-type-approval requirements. A charger with only GB/T 27930 DC communication and no OCPP implementation cannot integrate with IEC-standard back-office systems used by Rwanda network operators.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩固件支持目标卢旺达网络运营商或项目规范可接受的OCPP版本；(2) CCS2直流充电站将GB/T 27930直流通信替换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈；(3) 为RSB PVoC准备ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC 61000系列EMC测试报告；(4) 远程监控和故障报告功能符合RURA或项目业主要求；(5) 如有智能计量或射频功能，须确认RSB / RURA的无线电型式认证要求。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信且无OCPP实现的充电桩无法与卢旺达网络运营商使用的IEC标准后台系统集成。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁固件支持目標盧旺達網絡運營商或項目規範可接受的OCPP版本；(2) CCS2直流充電站將GB/T 27930直流通訊替換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧；(3) 為RSB PVoC準備ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC 61000系列EMC測試報告；(4) 遠程監控和故障報告功能符合RURA或項目業主要求；(5) 如有智能計量或射頻功能，須確認RSB / RURA的無線電型式認證要求。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊且無OCPP實現的充電樁無法與盧旺達網絡運營商使用的IEC標準後台系統集成。

mandatory_status.target: OCPP: Required by project specification for networked chargers where a charging management system is deployed; mandatory applicability to all Rwanda operators not confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14 — confirm with RURA and project owner. EMC: Mandatory via RSB PVoC for electrical product imports
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication; it is not OCPP-compatible. GB EMC reports are not RSB PVoC IEC 61000 substitutes without clause-level comparison

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Networked chargers entering Rwanda should be OCPP-capable to integrate with IEC-standard back-office systems used by project operators; confirm mandatory OCPP version requirements with RURA and the specific network operator. IEC 61000-series EMC evidence is required for RSB PVoC. GB/T 27930 DC communication is incompatible with CCS2 back-office stacks and must be replaced for DC stations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入卢旺达的联网充电桩应支持OCPP，以便与项目运营商使用的IEC标准后台系统集成；须与RURA及具体网络运营商确认强制OCPP版本要求。RSB PVoC要求IEC 61000系列EMC证据。GB/T 27930直流通信与CCS2后台通信栈不兼容，直流充电站须进行替换。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入盧旺達的聯網充電樁應支持OCPP，以便與項目運營商使用的IEC標準後台系統集成；須與RURA及具體網絡運營商確認強制OCPP版本要求。RSB PVoC要求IEC 61000系列EMC證據。GB/T 27930直流通訊與CCS2後台通訊棧不兼容，直流充電站須進行替換。
